data.body: DECISION: Option A APPROVED by owner (2026-07-13). Storage = extend the existing SIGNATURE event record with an optional DSSE 'envelope' + bound {ticket_id, material_fingerprint, merged_log_commit}; reducer process_signature preserves them into attestations[kind]; new producer writes an envelope-bearing SIGNATURE event via opcert.sign_opcert; read helper returns (envelope, bound_fields)|None. Compaction/snapshot fold preserves them; older clones preserve-and-ignore (rollout: upgrade reconcile hosts first). Mirrors git gpgsig (extend the object, tolerant reader) rather than a new event type. Proceeding under held-out TDD.
